## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.48

### Camera WebRTC
- Continues prerelease camera testing for accounts where audio starts but video still does not render.
- Keeps the APK-style receive-audio, receive-video, data-channel startLive, and changeTransceiverOffer flow.
- Constrains the camera-facing H264 offer to the bridge-decodable 42001f profile so the Home Assistant WebRTC bridge can decode incoming RTP frames.

### Debug Logging
- Logs the selected camera SDP answer profile and bridge codec preference context for follow-up camera reports.
- Keeps startLive, first-frame timeout, RTP, and renegotiation diagnostics compact and token-safe.
